definition-md-generation.description: Init skill generates DEFINITION.md for each set alongside CONTRACT.json

graceful-loadset.signature: loadSet(cwd, setId): { definition: SetDefinition | null, contract }
graceful-loadset.description: loadSet() gracefully handles missing DEFINITION.md with warning instead of ENOENT

solo-config-field.description: Project-wide solo mode config; start-set uses solo mode when true

worktree-package-install.description: createWorktree() detects package manager and installs dependencies

auto-commit-after-init.description: Init auto-commits all generated planning artifacts (ROADMAP.md, STATE.json, contracts, definitions)

definition-md-always-created.description: After init, every set directory contains both CONTRACT.json and DEFINITION.md

loadset-never-throws-enoent.description: loadSet() never throws ENOENT for DEFINITION.md; returns null definition with warning

solo-config-respected.description: When config.json has solo: true, start-set behaves as if --solo was passed

worktree-deps-available.description: After createWorktree(), tests can import all project dependencies

init-auto-commits.description: After init completes, all generated planning artifacts are committed automatically
